title: POST-H-019-C — Install dry-run y exposure report
commands: python -m pytest -p no:ddtrace tests/test_post_h_019_plugin_static_validator.py tests/test_post_h_019_plugin_execution_blocked.py tests/test_post_h_019_plugin_permission_model.py tests/test_post_h_019_plugin_sandbox_design.py tests/test_plugin_registry.py tests/test_schema_registry.py tests/test_project_global_state.py tests/test_post_h_018_connector_sandbox_policy.py -q
python -m devpilot_core plugin dry-run --plugin-id local.docs.plugin --operation metadata --dry-run --json
python -m devpilot_core schema validate --schema-id PostHManifest --instance docs/post_h_019_c_manifest.json --json
risks: Confundir install dry-run con instalación real o ejecución de plugins.
Leer manifest_path o entrypoints arbitrarios durante validación metadata-only.
Sobredeclarar soporte de plugins ejecutables antes de una ADR y sandbox real.
limitations: POST-H-019-C produce validación estática, install dry-run metadata-only y exposure report; no implementa quality gate.
Plugin execution, carga dinámica, subprocess, red, filesystem write, pip install y marketplace permanecen bloqueados.
Quality gate plugin-sandbox-design queda para POST-H-019-D y runbook final para POST-H-019-E.
notes: Plugin exposure report separates declared, validated, install-simulated and executable states.
Manifest validation and exposure reporting are not executable authorization.
Future plugin execution requires ADR, sandbox, RBAC, approvals, tests, observability and rollback.
pass_criteria: Static validator does not import plugin code or use subprocess for plugin behavior.
Exposure report and CLI keep network_used=false, external_api_used=false and mutations_performed=false.
block_criteria: BLOCK if dry-run executes plugin code.
BLOCK if dependency installation or marketplace access is allowed.
BLOCK if arbitrary plugin manifest files or entrypoints are read as install input.
BLOCK if exposure report declares plugin execution available.
